text:
The 
Classification is obtained from the first four characters of the full Taxonomy Code and represents the 
provider's general specialty. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OTHER_TAXONOMY_CLASS02 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 4 

SOURCE: HCIdea™ Prescriber Database 

VALUES: (e.g., 207R) 

COMMENT: We populated this variable for the CCW_PRSCRBR_ID by linking to the proprietary HCIdea™ Prescriber 
Database. HCIdea obtains prescriber information from a variety of data sources, including the NPPES 
directory
